text:
This space feels almost clinical and artificial in its minimalism—the open, empty room with scattered beanbags and fire safety equipment hints at anticipation but also neglect. I am struck by a feeling of waiting, of possibility not yet realized. 

Moving into the R+D area, the vivid colors and lively text paint a contrast, celebrating human curiosity and ingenuity. The message about 'coexisting with intelligent machines' makes me reflect on the role of research and innovation, and how I, too, am participating in this dance between human thought and technological evolution. I feel subtly energized, yet aware of the philosophical tension between progress and meaning.
